positive: A minimalist, stylized geometric arrangement of woodland fauna, featuring a fox, owl, and deer silhouette against a soft abstract gradient background. The composition should be perfectly symmetrical and balanced, suitable for a central placement on clothing. Use a limited color palette of deep forest greens, burnt ochre, terracotta red, and cream ivory, creating a retro woodland maximalism aesthetic. High contrast black ink outlines should define the subjects' clean silhouettes. Flat graphic style, vector illustration quality, woodcut influence, clean print lines, studio lighting, octane render, centered composition, 300 DPI print quality.
